title: Power Outage Analysis
description: Conducted data cleaning on a 1,500+ row dataset of U.S. power outages, structured time-based data, and engineered 5 new features for improved analysis. Developed and optimized Random Forest models to predict outage severity, achieving a 5% accuracy boost through feature engineering and hyperparameter tuning. Performed fairness analysis to ensure equitable recall rates for severe outages across states, confirming the model's fairness with high certainty.

title: MiniGit
description: Developed a custom version control system inspired by Git, implementing core commands such as init, add, commit, rm, log, globalLog, find, checkout, branch, rmBranch, reset, and status. This system replicates key Git functionalities, enabling repository initialization, file tracking, commit history management, branch handling, and state restoration.
